programme.desc: Caillou is helping Grandma water her flowers and fill the birdbath. // Caillou and his friends Jason and Jeffrey make finger puppets at playschool and decide to put on a puppet show. // In the park Caillou starts a new hobby – collecting rocks!

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Shoo, Shoo Bird, Fly Away! // Caillou's Road Trip // Caillou and the Dragon
programme.desc: When birds keep eating the seeds in Mommy and Caillou's newly planted garden, they come up with the idea of making a scarecrow. // One fine day the family is going on a car trip. // There's a special visitor at Caillou's playschool - a boy named Alan who has Down's Syndrome.

programme.title: Caillou

programme.desc: Caillou is playing with the fridge magnets and learns lots of things about them. // The whole family goes on a trip to the natural history museum to look at the dinosaurs. // Caillou wants to play with both his friends Clementine and Xavier in the playschool playground.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou the Librarian // Caillou the Bookworm // Caillou the Storyteller
programme.desc: Caillou is excited about showing Rosie the ropes when they visit the library. // Returning home from the library Caillou is very eager to sit down and enjoy his pirate book. // It's a rainy day at playschool and the children can't go outside.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: A Present for Mommy // Caillou the Chef // Caillou the Painter
programme.desc: Mommy's having a bad day - first she can't find her car keys, then she and Caillou have to shovel the car out, and then the car won't start! // Jeffrey and Jason are coming over for dinner - it's a make-your-own pizza party! // Caillou's got a brand new painting shirt and decides to paint something for Grandma.

programme.desc: When Bronwyn decides she needs to record some relaxing whale song Charlie offers to take her out on the skiff to find a whale. Ben turns up and Bronwyn suggests that as he knows so much about whales, he should come along too. // Whilst doing some...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: A large turtle has been spotted off the coast of Pontypandy, causing lots of excitement. Ben is a marine wildlife enthusiast, so plans to set off with Sam and Steele to attach a camera to the turtle. // Charlie accompanied by Dilys, takes Norman...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Moose is taking a group on a 'Rock Spotting Trip' up Pontypandy Mountain. Even though they are not supposed to feed the animals, Sarah and Lily start feeding a little sheep. // The quay is abuzz with activity as contestants prepare for the...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Mrs Chen is directing the Pontypandy Players new show about the pirate, Pontypandy Pete. Sam is given the starring role, whilst Norman and Hannah have been tasked with decorating the prop pirate ship. // Mandy decides to give the garden a makeover...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: The Return of Norman-Man // The Return of Norman-Man Pt. 2
programme.desc: The firefighters are doing training drills when Boyce turns up and tells Station Officer Steele that he's going to have to stop the drills and start doing some boring paperwork. Meanwhile on the other side of town Norman is playing Superheroes...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Sam and the crew arrive at Lizzie's Vet Surgery to find that Woolly is stuck on the roof! Meanwhile the Pioneers are off with Trevor, trying to get their map-reading badges in two teams - Norman and Mandy and James and Sarah. // It's Sam's...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Norman wants a dog so is looking after Auntie Phyllis' dog to prove what a good owner he can be. But the dog won't do anything that Norman asks. Things only get worse when Norman takes the dog for a walk by the river with Dilys and Trevor. // Mrs...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: Spy Games // Fox on the Run
programme.desc: Norman is making the "best spy movie ever" about an international spy, but unfortunately poor James has been roped in as his stunt double. He's nervous about doing dangerous stunts, and messes them all up. // While Lizzie is giving an examination...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: The Great Party Panic // The Break-Up
programme.desc: It's autumn and getting dark early, so Sarah and James plan to host a spooky party in the Wholefish Café for their friends. But Sarah takes over all of the organising and leaves James with just one job... to make a bat decoration. // Sam arrives...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: Fiery Football // Lost in the Caves
programme.desc: Norman is hurrying out the door blowing a vuvuzela, excited to watch the sporting event of the year - a football match between the Flaming Hoses (Sam, Penny, Elvis) and Pontypandy United (Lizzie, Tom, Moose). But Norman is frustrated to learn that...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: Wicker Bear // Castles in the Air
programme.desc: MOOSE shows a photo album of himself as a child building animals out of sticks in the Canadian mountains. The Wildmen of Pontypandy (Moose and TOM) are taking the Pontypandy Pioneers (MANDY, NORMAN, DEREK, SARAH and TREVOR) up the mountain for a...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: Ice Hockey Meltdown // Float your Boat
programme.desc: It's freezing and Mike Flood is building an ice rink in his back garden. The kids are going to play ice hockey on it - except Noman can't skate, and so is forced to use a penguin skating aid. He tries to pretend that this is a ice hockey "secret...

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.sub-title: Froggy Fantasy // Dashing through the Snow
programme.desc: Sam is supervising a forest fire drill - it's the beginning of summer, and the forest is dry. It's also the grand opening of the refurbished lido. Bronwyn is staging a Froggy Fantasy - a synchronised swimming spectacular.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: My First Signs: See and Sign With Baby
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby
programme.desc: One of the greatest joys you'll ever experience is bonding with your baby during those calm, quiet moments. Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby provides comforting sights and sounds as you relax and share this precious downtime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's Favorite Places: First Words Around Town
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies dance, before watching two girls do some Flamenco dancing with their teacher. It's time for the Teletubbies to wash their feet. They love using their Tubby Sponges.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa sit down to eat some Tubby Custard. Po wants some too. She tries to eat the other's Tubby Custard, but they won't let her.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies crawl through the arch in Home Hill and watch Alex Pascall and some children sing 'Handy Hands'.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and makes the Teletubbies laugh. They watch some children exploring the colour green. The Teletubbies love green.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches the Teletubbies a nursery rhyme. Then they watch Becky go for a ride on a Tram. Po rides her scooter too fast and knocks the other Tubbies over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep, but Noo-Noo tidies up their blankets. They stop chasing him to watch some children learn about the number five. A flashing light appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky calls the other Tubbies to come and watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story about the naughty sock. The Tubby Toast machine makes a tower of tubby toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po's present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow. All the Teletubbies laugh as they play in the snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It's time for the Teletubbies to do their exercises. A voice trumpet rises and the Teletubbies stretch up and down to it's instructions.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa dances with her ball. A little boy tells us why he likes to live in his block of flats. A balloon appears in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies follow a balloon.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney demonstrates the benefits of exercise and healthy habits.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ leads the group in a day of fun and games with a variety of different balls and activities.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps the children discover how much fun numbers can be by going on a number hunt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.sub-title: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes
programme.desc: An art show prompts an opportunity for Barney and his friends to learn about colors and shapes.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the children find creative ways to teach Baby Bop how to spell her name.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The children show off their special talents in an I Can Do show.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends help a new friend feel welcome when she moves into the neighborhood.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends learn about safety with a little help from his friend, Firefighter Bill.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The children have a fun day playing with and learning about cars BJ even participates in a real car race!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.sub-title: My Friends, The Doctor and Dentist
programme.desc: Barney and the children discover the importance of healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting check-ups, exercising and eating healthy foods.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.sub-title: Way to Go! - A Travel Adventure
programme.desc: When Baby Bop finds out that Daniel is going on a trip, she wants to go on one as well. Everyone pretends to travel the same way Daniel will travel.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.sub-title: The Misbegotten Moon - A Space Adventure
programme.desc: When Baby Bop thinks the half-moon is somehow broken, Barney and Friends take an imaginary visit to the moon where Barney eases her concerns.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.sub-title: The Sword in the Sandbox - A Storybook Adventure
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that hes just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Cock A Doodle Spud / Wendy's Surprise Party
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles needs Bob to build a hencoop. / Wendy is holding a surprise party for her sister Jenny.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob's got some new boots, but they squeak! / Bob returns to the Yard with a mud-splattered Scoop and Muck.

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.desc: Bob is insulating Mrs. Potts' loft. Wendy is building an enclosure for the local dog show.

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.desc: Bob and team are building a barn for Farmer Pickles. / Farmer Pickles wants to open a camp site on his land.

programme.desc: Mr Beasley is having a conservatory built. / Bob and Wendy have been invited to a lunch at the Town Hall.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Spud and the Doves / First Aid Molly
programme.desc: Mr Ellis has doves delivered to use in a magic act. / Bob and the gang are replacing pipes outside town hall.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob goes bird-watching. / Bob, Wendy and the Machines are making the town a nicer place to live.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Wendy's Big Night Out / Racing Muck
programme.desc: Bob and Wendy are converting a shop into a restaurant. / Bob is building a new swimming pool for the Mayor.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Spud & Squawk / Scoop Has Some Fun

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Mr Sabatini's Smashing Day / Roley To The Rescue
programme.desc: Bob is rendering a wall for Mr Sabatini. / After a stormy night Wendy has to mend a chimney pot at Mrs Potts'.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Muck has a sleepover with Travis. Wendy, Muck, and Dizzy put up a new signpost at the crossroads.

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.desc: Bob is making a through-lounge at the Bentleys'. / Mr Fothergill has a nasty case of dry rot.

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Dizzy and the Talkie Talkie / Scoop's Recruit
programme.desc: Bob and the team are drilling a well at their homestead. / Scoop and Dizzy help Wendy with digging and mixing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: When the Berry Fairy Came to Stay
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines. Realizing that Strawberry is a very kind & caring person, the little fairy decides to take advantage of the kid's good nature.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One windy day, a tiny fairy named Sherry Bobbleberry gets blown into Strawberry's open window. She is a klutzy little thing who is convinced she will always be a major goof-up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Apple Dumplin' wants to help Strawberry & her Friends with the baking. But Dumplin's just a little too little to be much help. In fact, she ends up making a pretty big mess of things.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake: she's really giving this festival all she has!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance - and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's winter and the pond's frozen and that means Strawberry and friends can ice skate! They decide to showcase their talents at an Ice Dance Show. But just then, a new kid named Apricot shows up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends are getting the band back together to perform at a local festival, but Ginger Snap is out of town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years - and then only for a day!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: After an accidental wager with Purple Pieman, Strawberry sets off to prove that she can go around the world in 80 days.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One night, as Strawberry & Friends gaze at the stars, they talk about what they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Lemon and Raspberry's fashion podcast is saved by Apple, then almost sabotaged by Sweet and Sour when Lemon's "mood hair" runs amok, acting like the bickering twins, and the twins' comical argument is accidentally broadcast on the "berrynet."

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Sour wishes she could have a birthday all her very own, her twin sister Sweet grants her wish by forgoing celebrating her birthday. But what begins as a day that Sour has always dreamed of quickly becomes a disappointment when she misses her twin. With Strawberry's help, Sour gives her birthday back to Sweet with a special surprise.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When a comedy of errors causes Orange, Plum and Cherry to arrive late to their campout, they start off their annual tradition of telling tall-tales around the campfire.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the "Berry Deep Dark Forest." She tries to get Sweet to participate in spinning the tale, but Sour's over-the-top performance leaves Sweet behind. Toward the end, Sour graciously changes the story to pull Sweet into it, giving Sweet the opportunity to toss in an ad lib that makes a nice topper to Sour's story.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines. When everyone learns what awesome feats Plum has planned for her own dog, the competition heats up, everyone wanting their pup to perform in an even more spectacular manner. The training sessions go comically awry, with morale starting to plummet.

programme.title: Foods that Rise
programme.desc: Rise and shine! The Taste Buds expand their food horizons! Avery tries to see how high he can make a strawberry shortcake rise, and the result towers above anything he's made before. Lily tours a bakery to find out if the rumour is true: that bread rises because of gases given off by – yuck – fungus! Back at the kitchen, Matt helps Lily and Avery stack up some new uses for day-old bread, with delicious results.

programme.title: Foods that Stretch
programme.desc: Can you make your food streeeetch? When Matt and Lily make pizza dough that breaks instead of stretches over the pizza pan, Science Whiz shows them how kneading the dough is the key to the science of stretch. At an authentic noodle restaurant, Avery watches a professional noodle puller hand-stretch 1000 strands of noodles. Back at home base, Avery and Lily stretch out the noodle dough for their own take on Italian ravioli!

programme.title: Down for the Count
programme.desc: Despite taking huge amounts of damage, Go Onizuka keeps fighting and Link Summons his ace monster: Gouki the Great Ogre. Driving Playmaker into a tough corner, he aims to fight back against his strong opponent.

programme.title: True Blue
programme.desc: Yusaku meets with Aoi Zaizen, the sister of Akira Zaizen, a higher up in SOL Technologies to gauge their threat. Aoi is a celebrity named Blue Angel who publicly challenges Playmaker to a duel. However, Hanoi lurks in the background.

programme.title: Blippi's London Bus Special
programme.desc: Climb inside a double-decker bus and explore the great city of London with Blippi!

programme.title: Snowberry and Seven Berrykins
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a “berrytale play” for the kids, sort of a “Story Time On Stage.” Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production—until she hears about a gigantic production of “Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins” that's a smash hit in Berry Big City. She becomes convinced that unless she does the same play in the same grand scale, she'll be the laughing stock of the berry bitty theatrical world! Plum races the play into production.

programme.title: Berryella and Prince Berry Charming
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a “Story Time On Stage” musical play for the Berrykin kids: “Berryella and Prince Berry Charming,” directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother. Orange is the stage manager, assisted by stagehands Berrykin Ed and Berrykin Earl. They've barely begun when they face their first problem: the Berrykin who was supposed to play Prince Charming has broken his toe and must bow out of the production!

programme.title: Mission In The Jungle -Winx Club
programme.desc: Roxy asks the Winx for help: on the Earth, the Sumatran tigers are in danger because they are hunted by shapeshifting poachers, contaminated by a source of Wild Magic. The Winx leave on the Owl to save the tigers and their Fairy Animals and the Specialists go along with them. Once arrived, the Winx and the Specialists find the tiger cubs and fight against the shapeshifting poachers. Stella manages to break the spell and the mutant poachers turn back to their human form. Finally, the Winx take the cubs to safety in a new animal rescue park in Gardenia.

programme.title: A Fairy Animal For Tecna -Winx Club
programme.desc: At Alfea, Shiny and Amarok damage one of Roxy's techno-magic spheres. Tecna suggests the Winx to go and visit her parents on Zenith to repair it. Meanwhile Brafilius, in the ancient Zenith, analyses one of the Techquirrels (which feed the planet's core with energy) to understand whether it has the Ultimate Power, but his action makes the core unstable. Seeing that Zenith is in a chaos, the Winx reach Brafilius in the past: Tecna manages to both save one of the Techquirrels and to bring Zenith back to normal. Finally Flitter, the Techquirrel bonded with Tecna, manages to repair the techno-magic sphere.

programme.title: On the Road
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone. Strawberry and her friends give the Berrykins a crash course in city-sitting.

programme.title: A Boy and His Dogs
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City. What the Berrykins mistook for a monster was really the bunch of cute pups Huck has been trying to get adopted. While Huck's van is being repaired, Strawberry invites Huck and his seven pups to spend the night in the new bedroom above the marketplace, while she bunks in her old bedroom above the café. The next morning, Strawberry discovers that the playful pups have given her bedroom a total makeover –the wrong kind. An embarrassed Huck insists on staying until he can repair the damage.

programme.title: Foods that are Purple
programme.desc: Purple powers activate! Avery and Matt cook up some freaky purple mashed potatoes witha side of purple coleslaw and then get artistic when they realize their plates need a little more colour. Lily ventures out to a gelato emporium to sample their rainbow-coloured flavours, learn how gelato is made, and find out if colour can affect a food's taste. Then it's blackberries versus blueberries as our hosts ask which fruit contains the most purple-staining action!

programme.title: Foods that Sizzle
programme.desc: Avery makes some noise when he and Matt create chicken & veggie fajitas with that classic restaurant sizzle. Lily gets cooking right at her table when she visits the sizzle experts: a Korean barbecue restaurant. Then it's a sizzle showdown as the Taste Buds cook up a traditional Greek feast... and see which skewered delight is the loudest on the grill. These foods have something to say!

programme.title: Super Science Tools
programme.desc: They're all perfect tools for investigating and exploring the world, but Sid can't figure out which one is his favorite! His friends help him discover that each science tool is amazing in its own special way.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Ruby's Ranger Adventure // The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: At Your Service // A Hard Rain
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Behind the Scenes // Paperdoll in Peril
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Singing in the Rain // Mail Carrier Mayhem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Going Golfing // Case of the Stolen Spectacles
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Up in the Air // AdDRESSing the Problem
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Wakey Wakey // Rules of the Road
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. The problem is that the noodle tree, which grows noodles, decided to take a year off and is not growing any noodles this year. // Ling Ling and the friends are worried about the discouraged Gina. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Colorful Way to Cool Off // Seeing in Believing
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! Upset, he leads an all-out effort to convince her to stay, showing her that Fender Bend is the best place to live-despite Avery's protests that she's too busy. Finally, Avery confronts their strange behaviour.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Green Phantom // Over Easy Does It
programme.desc: Rev is sure he has the perfect plan to catch an elusive frog, but Avery isn't so sure. After all of his attempts fall through, he's finally ready to accept help-and Avery's idea just might work! Will they finally catch the Green Phantom? // Rev and Avery compete to transport supplies to town for a big event. Avery is faster, so Rev tries to take a short cut to get ahead-but an obstacle stops him in his tracks. How will he finish his delivery in time, let alone win the competition?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery go on an adventure to discover the Crystal Cavern. As they enter the first cave, a swarm of bats scare Rumble so much, he takes off through a maze of tunnels! They can't worry about the Crystal Cavern-they have to find Rumble first! // When Molly tells a campfire story about the Fender Bend Beast, the kids' imaginations run wild. Covered in goop and debris, Rumble scares them into thinking he's the Beast! Avery hatches a plan to trap the "Beast" and save Rumble, who's gone missing

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Winter Bestival // The Mystery of Missing Trees
programme.desc: After a snowstorm, Rev and Avery compete for title of Champion of the Winter Bestival! Avery is determined to hold her title from last year. Rev's Dad suggests a "slow and steady" approach to win, but Rev can't resist using "Rumble power!" // When Rumble wakes Rev in the middle of the night, they hear a strange sound, and see lights in the forest. The next day, Ben encourages them to investigate further. Rev and his friends follow the trail of missing trees to discover the truth!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend
programme.desc: When damage from a storm threatens to cancel the Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park Skills Contest, Owen is disappointed he won't get to compete. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in disguise! // Rev and the gang make their own castle and play as knights of old. But when their sticks and building supplies begin to disappear, Bo leads them into a medieval battle of wits with the culprit-a cranky beaver!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev offers to help look after a rambunctious puppy, Rumble gets jealous of all the attention he gets. And much to his annoyance, while Rev and Avery try everything to teach the pup new tricks (with no success), it only has eyes for Rumble! // When Rev tries to teach Rumble to swim with his special inflated tires, Rumble keeps sinking to the bottom of the pond. Ben and Molly suggest they get advice from Gilly, the old Fender Bend ferry pilot.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bumper Ball // Vroom with a View
programme.desc: When a game of Bumper Ball gets a little too heated, the friends start competing against their own teammates! But when a stray ball knocks open the sheep pen, they'll have to learn to work together to round up the sheep...and get back to the game! // Rev and his friends receive a map in pieces, so they race up separate mountain trails, vying to be first to claim the treasure at the top. But when there's no treasure in sight at the end, Rev's parents have some advice for finding the real reward.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery set out to conquer a legendary endurance course, the course's challenges put their truck power to the test. But as they near the end, a call for help takes them off course-and straight into a rescue mission to save their heroes! // When Rev sees Lori working the quarry in secret, Lori asks Rev to keep it secret-she worries she isn't good enough, and dreams of working with the big quarry trucks one day. But when quarry workers need help, Rev has to convince Lori to save the day!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Camping Trip // Like Father Like Son
programme.desc: Rev can't wait to take Avery camping. But when he learns they're trying a new campsite for the first time ever, he is disappointed-what if the new campsite isn't as fun...or worse...boring?! It's up to Avery to get him excited for a new adventure! // Rev wants to be just like his dad, so he and Rumble attempt Ben and Duke's usual tasks. They're disappointed when they aren't strong enough to tackle the big jobs the way Ben would, but sometimes, a little Rev magic and Rumble power are even better!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev and Avery find a stray kitten, they put posters around to alert its owner. The owner arrives at the Gear Up Garage...just as the kitty vanishes! Rev and the gang set out to find the kitten, and Operation Kitten Care becomes Operation Rescue! // When Rev leads the gang in a fossil hunting expedition, they find an enormous skull! But when Molly breaks the news that they'll have to leave the skeleton for professionals to dig up, Rev wonders how he can still have a dinosaur of his own.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: A Gift for Molly // Lights, Camera, Action!
programme.desc: It's Mudder's Day-everyone's favourite day of the year! The Stunt Park is filled with mud, and the whole town gets to drive through it. But Rev can't join them until he gets a gift for his Mom...and the stores are all closed for the festivities! // After Bo shows off his action-hero moves, Rev wants him to star in his film. Bu Bo freezes with stage fright as soon as Rev turns the camera on! Bo wants to be brave and come through for his friends, but how can he overcome his fear?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Stuckey the garbage truck dreams of entering the Auto Show, so Rev and the gang clean him up for his big debut. But after saving his friends from danger, Stuckey winds up covered in mud all over again...just in time for his moment in the spotlight! // When Lori only receives two tickets to a movie premiere, her friends compete to see which one of them is her "best friend." But watching her friends compete only makes Lori feel terrible-she'd rather not go to the movie at all!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: In Deep Doo-Doo // Rev's Tree Party
programme.desc: When Rev asks to help beautify the town, he insists there's no job too tough! That is...until he finds out he'll be hauling stinky manure. Rev tries to pawn the job off, until Avery tells him the best way to get it done is to just... "doo-doo" it! // When the gang organizes a birthday party for Rev, Avery insists they keep it secret. After hiding Rev's gifts in a tree, they realize the presents are stuck up there and will need to be retrieved-all before Rev figures out what's going on!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Driving Miss Dottie // Follow the Bouncing Wrecking Ball
programme.desc: When Miss Dottie goes missing, Rev and Avery offer to return her to the Rancher's Jamboree! Rumble is star-struck by the show-sheep, until the unlikely duo become friends. Back safe, Miss Dottie takes the stage, this time with her new pal Rumble! // Rev is determined to master Rumble's new wrecking-ball attachment, but things quickly get out of hand when the duo refuse to ask for help. Now they'll need all the help they can get to stop the wayward ball from wrecking all of Fender Bend!

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Jenny's Magic Shop
programme.desc: Jenny and her best friend Blam the Teddy Bear run a magic shop in the town of Dreamville, where everybody can come for magical help. The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

programme.title: Cloud Babies
programme.desc: Cloud Babies is about four toddlers, Baba Pink, Baba Blue, Baba Yellow, and Baba Green whose job is to look after the sky and their Sky Friends, Sun, Moon, Rainbow, Fluffa Cloud and Little Star. They live together with Bobo White, a mischievous little Sky Imp, in a house on a big fluffy cloud.

programme.title: Bubu and the Little Owls
programme.desc: Follow the adorable adventures of Bubu, a curious and energetic young owl who is always in a hurry to explore the world outside her shell!

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: Doby & Disy
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Play with Cocobi
programme.desc: Color play, dance, and more. Let's have fun with Cocobi!

programme.title: Mr. Moon
programme.desc: You know Mr Moon. We all do. Just look out your window at night—there he is! Climbing up his ladder and taking his place in the star-studded indigo sky. But have you ever wondered what Mr Moon does when he's NOT shining down on us? Well, that, my friends, is where our story begins.

programme.title: Cocobi Sing-Alongs Toys
programme.desc: Sing along to popular kid's songs with Cocobi toys!

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Mia
programme.desc: Mia is a curious and daring 6-year-old mouse who gets excited about everything! She wants to see, try and experience it all! With the help of her grandma, friends and neighbors, she discovers the amazing world around her.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Soothe yourself with relaxing music as you watch Annie, Elly and Kent drift into a beautiful slumber

programme.title: Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Rock your kids to sleep with our carefully curated lullabies featuring Hush Little Baby and more!

programme.desc: Create magical dreams as you sway away to calming melodies featuring Annie, Elly and Kent

programme.title: Chiki Art Soothing Moments
programme.desc: Unleash your inner creativity with Chiki Art Soothing's artworks like Mermaid, Unicorn, and more.

programme.title: Rise and Shine
programme.desc: Take a musical trip every morning with Down by the Bay, Outside my window I see, Car Song and more!

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is inspired to embark on his own adventure around the island of Sodor.

programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: Alphablocks

programme.desc: The fun-filled adventures of 26 lively letters who can make invisible words in the sky come to life by holding hands.

programme.title: Oddbods
programme.desc: Seven unusual characters laugh, fool and trip their way through life.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: The Knights Code
programme.desc: Jestro uses the Book of Chaos to unleash, um, chaos and attack the King's hover train to try and kidnap the royal party. Can the NEXO-Knights bring order out of the chaos and save the King? Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him he tells Jestro he's not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn't listen. Now the Book unleashes chaotic monsters and Jestro uses them to attack the King and his party who are on a business-related tour of the kingdom. When the NEXO-Knights show up to stop the monster attacks and realize that they must save King and Queen Halbert – Macy's parents – from the chaotic evil monsters that have been unleashed. Clay asserts himself as leader and brings order to the knights from the chaos. He has his own book: the Book of the Knight's Code. They should all live by it.

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: The Snake King
programme.desc: Pythor declares himself to be the destined leader who will reawaken The Great Devourer – an ancient beast who can't be killed and will consume all of Ninjago. We find out Nya is the Samurai and Lloyd is taken prisoner by the snake tribes.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: Emma's Dilemma
programme.desc: When Stephanie becomes obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in a float building contest and accidentally disregards Emma's ideas and design, Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to get revenge on Stephanie. When the girls enter a float-building contest, Emma is especially excited to share her design idea for the float. But no one is listening to her, especially Stephanie, who's become obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in the contest. Emma finally does find someone who appreciates her design… Tanya! Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to build the float design. But is Tanya just using Emma to get revenge on Stephanie?

programme.title: Tick Tock
programme.desc: When the four ninja follow the mysterious falcon into the woods, they stumble on a hidden work shop where Zane learns the secret about his past and in the process, finally knowing who he is, he is the first ninja to unlock his true potential.

programme.title: The Golden Castle
programme.desc: When Lance is cast as the star in the new remake of the classic movie “Ned Knightly and the Golden Castle” he doesn't anticipate Jestro and his monsters invading the set and ruining his starring role. It's movie time! Lance does something very Lance: he agrees to star in a movie about remake of a classic film in Knighton: “The Golden Castle.” While pillaging a village, Jestro and the Book of Monsters see a movie poster for “The Golden Castle” and the book says the legendary Golden Castle is filled with riches! Jestro explains that it's just a dumb movie and that it's not real. It's all based on a “script.” The Book, who's been shelved for many years, wants to eat the movie script to learn more about the modern world. On the set of the movie, Lance has invited the other Knights to act as extras. When they see how Lance is being portrayed, they're incensed. When Jestro attacks the movie set to get the script for his book to eat, the film director keeps rolling. This battle footage is fantastic! The Knights defeat Jestro even though the movie set is trashed. The director will make it work. At the premier of the movie, Lance is embarrassed to see that he's been reduced to comic relief for the realm's bravest Knight…Macy! The director has now made her a star.

programme.title: Friends of The Jungle
programme.desc: When Olivia's Aunt Sophie is getting married and the groom has gone missing in the jungle, the girls fly out to the jungle in secret to try to find him in time for the wedding. The girls are super excited to be planning a wedding for Olivia's Aunt Sophie. There's just one little problem: Olivia learns that the groom has gone missing in the jungle while working at an animal rescue station! Not wanting to worry her aunt, Olivia, Stephanie and Mia secretly fly to the jungle to try and find the groom, Henry, rescuing a few animals along the way. Too bad Emma and Andrea couldn't keep the secret back in Heartlake City. Now, Sophie, Emma and Andrea join the others in the jungle to try and find Henry before the rapidly approaching wedding date!

programme.title: Once Bitten, Twice Shy
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have to cut their first date in Mega-Monster Amusement Park short as the Serpentine are on their way to retrieve the first or four fang blades to be used to awaken the Great Devourer.

programme.title: The Maze Of Amazement
programme.desc: The Knights find themselves trapped in a maze looking for the Book of Deception. But will they actually get their hands on it, or will it keep deceiving them? The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl's home town of DIGGINGTON (where they realize that all of Axl's family look just like him.) While they're there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books! It's “The Book of Deception.” They go to find it and discover it ended up under a mountain. And, to make matters worse, the magic book has built a maze around itself to keep it from being found (it is deceptive!) As the NEXO-Knights enter the maze from one side, Jestro enters from the other the Book of Monsters has led him to the maze to get The Book of Deception, too. It's a race through this confusing maze to see who can get the book first. Ava figures out the maze is the Whackman maze from a videogame. After help from Axl's people to defeat Jestro and win the book, the knights discover it's a FAKE BOOK of deception. The Book of Deception created a fake copy of itself!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.sub-title: Who Do You Think You Are

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic, Manic and Sonia find an abandoned baby in an alley and begin to look for the baby's parents. Manic becomes very fond of the child.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After the Shane hideout is ransacked, the gang trades in one of Eli's prized slugs for new gear. When Eli has second thoughts they go back to get it, only to learn that it's been sold to Dr. Blakk, along with hundreds of others to be transformed into feral Ghoul Slugs. Eli refuses to let his slug or any other get ghouled, so the team breaks in to Blakk's fortress to free them. While inside, they learn of Blakk's plan to conquer Slugterra.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The gang signs up for a weekend camp that promises to teach your slugs tons of new moves - without lifting a finger! Eli thinks it sounds too good to be true... and it is. But exposing the truth draws the ire of the camp's director - and half the campers!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Slug Run is the ultimate, off-road, no-holds-barred, cross-cavern Mecha Beast race. Unfortunately, the only thing lower than the odds of beating the three-time champ who's now racing for Dr. Blakk are the odds of Eli making it to the finish line in one piece!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When even Kord can't find a way to fix what's wrong with the new upgrades to the Shane Gang's Mecha Beasts, it's time to go to the source: the wondrous Mecha Forge! Hoping to find the cause of the glitch, the gang instead uncovers a huge conspiracy - hatched by Dr. Blakk!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A short cut takes the Shane Gang through the territory of the Shadow Clan - and try as they might not to, they are discovered and captured by the mysterious creatures. Just when it looks like our heroes are done for, they are helped out of this jam by a most unlikely savior.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Pronto is thrown in jail on trumped-up charges by a corrupt judge, and the only chance to break him out is Eli making a one-in-a-million trick shot. programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Long thought to be merely a legend, an Enigmo Slug has finally been spotted. The bidding is high for this rarest of all slugs, and so is the competition to be the first grab it! programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: After a wild ride on the mysterious Flumes - the Underriver that runs beneath all of Slugterra - the Shane gang find themselves dropped into a sea cavern.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The four members of the Shane Gang think they've found the fifth in Twist, a street-smart kid who volunteers his help when the gang needs it most on a mission gone wrong. But Twist harbors a dark secret that could doom the mission - and the Shane Gang.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The four members of the Shane Gang think they've found the fifth in Twist, a street-smart kid who volunteers his help when the gang needs it most on a mission gone wrong. But Twist harbors a dark secret that could doom the mission - and the Shane Gang.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Avalanched inside a frozen cavern, the Shane Gang can't figure out which is worse: being trapped with a vicious Ice Ogre that only gets bigger the more you shoot it?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Notorious con man Gar Rivelle has many convinced he has discovered the way to a secret land... a land that seems to be the surface! Keeping the surface secret is Eli's number one mission, so he steals the diary from Gar, sparking an all-out siege on the Shane HQ. Eli realizes that for him to continue in Slugterra, he's going to have to confide his greatest secret to his friends.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli fires slugs right and left during a fast-paced slugout on mecha-back! "See you back home," Eli tells the slugs he has to leave behind as he races across a cavern during the fight. programme.title: What Are You Laughing At?!
programme.desc: Featuring the best clips of the day and hilarious comedians who always have something funny to say.

programme.title: James Johann
programme.desc: James' childhood upbringing was significantly influenced by country music, countless bad hair cuts, and Catholic school. In 1991, James began his stand-up career in Kansas City. Today, James is a long-time veteran of the stand-up comedy circuit, performing at clubs across the country. His self-deprecating sense of humor and high energy style come together to create a unique onstage persona. James relies more on his brain than the profane and his comedy is a truthful and hilarious reflection of life as he sees it.

programme.title: Collin Moulton
programme.desc: Collin is one of the most fun, personable, and sought after headliners today. He has had his own stand-up special on SHOWTIME, he's been on NICKELODEON, and was recently featured on LAST CALL WITH CARSON DALY. Touring for over 15 years Collin has gained an ease and enjoyment on stage that makes every show worth watching.America knows and loves him. His familiarity and energy engages and relieves the audience before he even speaks. His electric storytelling style makes you care about every topic he explores. Collin's comedy is the release needed from our every day lives. Come needing to laugh tonight, leave wanting to laugh forever!Collin Moulton

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Chris Voth is an accomplished comedian, a licensed teacher, and a published author. Voth made his debut late-night television appearance on the Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson. He also appeared in three seasons of NBC's Last Comic Standing and was chosen for the prestigious Great American Comedy Festival. A 15-year comedy veteran, Voth is a past winner of the Denver Comedy Works Competition and has worked with everyone from Dave Chappelle to Larry the Cable Guy to Linda Ronstadt. Voth's first comedy CD titled "Never Mind the Jim J Bullocks, Here's the Chris Voth" is currently available for purchase. Chris currently balances his performance schedule with his full-time high-school teaching career. You can read his short story, "Stand Up and Deliver," published in the Cream City Review Literary Journal. In it, Chris shares the experiences he had when entering the teaching field after years in stand-up comedy.

programme.title: Dwight Slade
programme.desc: Part man, part ageless boy comedian Dwight Slade has the privilege of being a comedy legend in American stand up. The winner of this year's Boston Comedy Festival, Slade combines an intelligent, raging voice of justice with the snickering attitude of a high school prankster. He gives the impression of a man on a journey. Who enjoys nothing more than making fun of everything along the way. Born in Seattle, Dwight moved often in his early years, living in San Mateo, California Wilton, Connecticut Marietta, Georgia and Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Thirty year comedy veteran Dan St. Paul jokes about acting his age, his Italian heritage, and slowly becoming a cylinder the older he gets.

programme.title: Cleto Rodriguez
programme.desc: Rodriguez connects with audiences by relating everyday life experiences. Anything and everything is fair game, from marriage mishaps to the challenges of dieting. His comedy is high-energy, observational and hilarious with a brilliant Latino twist.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Growing up, Vinnie Montez always wanted to be a police officer, a dream that he realized in 1998. His experiences as a cop are the foundation for his comedy you just can't make some of this stuff up.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: The King Of Queens writer Dennis Regan comes swinging hard with his quick wit and flawless delivery. The laughs just keep on coming in "Dennisland".

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Lamuweri Guluka is an African name meaning “hard to pronounce on the first try.” Lam is a seasoned comedian who has performed at colleges, comedy clubs, and cafes all over the country whose background as a nerdy, suburban, black male gives him a unique comedic perspective that audiences love.

programme.title: Rob Schneider Soy Sauce and the Holocaust
programme.desc: He tells the side-splitting stories of the three hoods: childhood, adulthood, and parenthood. Rob isn't holding back any of the dirty details.

programme.title: Tim Allen Men Are Pigs
programme.desc: In this special from 1990, Tim Allen proves men are pigs as he discusses family and the differences between women and men.

programme.title: Eddie Griffin You Can Tell 'Em I Said It
programme.desc: Eddie Griffin proves once more that hes one of the worlds premiere comedic talents in this stand-up special You Can Tell Em I Said It.

programme.title: Eddie Griffin Undeniable
programme.desc: This comedy special is Eddie Griffin's magnum opus about the world, relationships and humanity as a whole.

programme.title: Gary Owen: Black Famous
programme.desc: From catching COVID to running out of shows to watch, this special is full of riotously funny real life stories you've come to expect from Gary.

programme.title: Gary Owen Breakin' Out the Park
programme.desc: In this brutally honest stand-up performance Owen confesses his hilarious history of growing up in and around trailer parks.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Join former MST3K stars Mike, Kevin, and Bill and let's all get our pesky thinking parts gobbled up by Brainiac!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Subspecies IV tells the tale of some very whispery, ancient, and deeply unappealing vampires fighting for power and ownership of an artifact called the Bloodstone. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about a boy who has to take his goat to the market. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Zlateh the Goat!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: In a remote bunker in the desert, unthinkable experiments are taking place. Experiments where horror legend Wes Craven sells his name and credibility to a movie in exchange for a writing credit for his son Jonathan! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Join former MST3K stars Mike, Kevin, and Bill for this classic 80s tale of snobs vs. slobs who are mutants who are zombies, Mutant! Starring cult legend Wings Hauser!

programme.title: The Warrior's Way
programme.desc: Yang, the world's finest swordsman, packs it in and leaves Japan to find an old friend in the Wild West rather than kill the infant queen of a rival clan. He carries the baby to his friend's desolate, broken-down town the friend has died, so Yang reopens a laundry and settles down, hanging wet clothes, growing flowers, raising the infant, and finding himself attracted to Lynne, a red-haired woman with a tragic past. As long as Yang keeps his sword sheathed, his rivals won't find him, but a band of reprobate gunmen terrorize the town and threaten Lynne. Showdowns are inevitable, but once the sword is drawn, can Yang find rest, a home, and a family?

programme.title: The Pledge
programme.desc: The night he retires as a Nevada sheriff, Jerry Black (Nicholson) pledges to the mother of a murdered girl that he will find the killer. Jerry doesn't believe the police arrested the right man he discovers this is the third incident in the area in the recent past with victims young, blond, pretty, and small for their age.

programme.title: The Illusionist
programme.desc: An Oscar-nominated drama set in early 1900s Vienna. An illusionist (Edward Norton, "Fight Club") uses his powers to charm an engaged aristocrat (Jessica Biel, "Next"). With Rufus Sewell and Paul Giamatti.

programme.title: Stonewall (2015)
programme.desc: Passions and politics make a volatile mix in this dynamic drama directed by Roland Emmerich that follows the events that led to the birth of the modern Gay Rights movement.

programme.title: Lila and Eve
programme.desc: Two distraught mothers team up to avenge their children's deaths.

programme.title: Waiting . . .
programme.desc: Always remember the cardinal rule of dining out: Never mess with the people who handle your food! Ryan Reynolds (GREEN LANTERN), Anna Ferris (TV's "Mom"), and Justin Long (LIVE FREE OR DIE HARD) star in this hilarious comedy about a group of young waiters and waitresses searching for the meaning of life, love, and friendship—while waiting for their next big tip— in this outrageous laugh-fest.

programme.title: The Warrior's Way
programme.desc: Yang, the world's finest swordsman, packs it in and leaves Japan to find an old friend in the Wild West rather than kill the infant queen of a rival clan. He carries the baby to his friend's desolate, broken-down town the friend has died, so Yang reopens a laundry and settles down, hanging wet clothes, growing flowers, raising the infant, and finding himself attracted to Lynne, a red-haired woman with a tragic past. As long as Yang keeps his sword sheathed, his rivals won't find him, but a band of reprobate gunmen terrorize the town and threaten Lynne. Showdowns are inevitable, but once the sword is drawn, can Yang find rest, a home, and a family?
