Jerry doesn't believe the police arrested the right man he discovers this is the third incident in the area in the recent past with victims young, blond, pretty, and small for their age.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: In this action-packed Western, the former leader of a disbanded all-female gang calls her comrades back to the saddle to hunt down hidden treasure and avenge the death of her sister.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A troubled detective travels to Memphis in order to track down a pair of serial killers.

programme.title: Blue Demon
programme.desc: Shark experts Nathan and Marla Collins are working on a top-secret government project: to protect the shorelines with controlled shark patrols. When their project is sabotaged, mutant great white sharks are released into the waterways.

programme.title: Killing Season
programme.desc: Robert De Niro and John Travolta star as two veterans hunting each other in this action thriller.

programme.title: An Autumn Romance
programme.desc: When librarian Taylor Harris suddenly loses her job, she visits her brother's small town in Montana, where she gets involved in helping save her brother's small-town hotel from tycoon, Joel Sheenan, who wants to renovate it.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: Jack works at a valentine's store and his ordinary life is interrupted when Catherine Shank, the owner's daughter, takes control of this one-of-a-kind business. After a shipping mistake fills their store with thousands of flowers, Catherine and Jack come up with a plan: have a town-wide valentine's day competition. As Jack gets roped into competing amidst the chaos, he and Catherine start to fall in love.

programme.title: The Break Up Artist
programme.desc: A young woman who gets paid to break people up is forced to become a matchmaker when some new competition muscles her out of the break-up business. Now, in order to save her company (and keep her high-priced wardrobe) she'll have to rely on her old nemesis: love.

programme.title: Love, Bubbles & Crystal Cove
programme.desc: The movie follows main character Skye and her bath and body business Lather and Luxury. Her childhood sweetheart arrives in town to help her improve it and sparks fly.

programme.title: Wedding March 3: Here Comes the Bride
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. It's a full Valentine's Day weekend at the Inn.

programme.title: Love at Sea
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Olivia gets a great opportunity to organize an event on a luxury cruise.

programme.title: Summer in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Sequel to Autumn in the Vineyard.

programme.title: Window Wonderland
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Sloan Van Doren is hoping to take over the head window designer spot.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Cassie is surprised with adventurous outings by both Sam and John.

programme.title: Her Husband's Betrayal
programme.desc: Cathy Coulter is looking forward to a bright future.

programme.title: A Woman Hunted
programme.desc: A young mother, just out of drug rehabilitation.

programme.title: Obsessed
programme.desc: Medical writer Ellena Roberts is arrested for harassing Dr. David Stillman.

programme.title: Her Husband's Betrayal
programme.desc: Cathy Coulter is looking forward to a bright future.

programme.title: The Family Fang
programme.desc: Two siblings finally confront their unusual childhood when their performance artist parents go missing.

programme.title: Solitary Man
programme.desc: A car magnate watches his life hit the skids because of his business and romantic indiscretions.

programme.title: Beatriz at Dinner
programme.desc: A provocative film about characters from vastly different sociopolitical backgrounds colliding over dinner.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A bear finds himself lost at Paddington Station, where he meets a family who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: STEVEN SPIELBERG and GEORGE LUCAS bring you the greatest adventurer of all time! Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull finds Indy trying to outrace a brilliant and beautiful agent for the mystical, all-powerful crystal skull of Akator.

programme.title: The Duellists
programme.desc: Two officers in Napoleon's army who violently confront each other in a series of duels.

programme.title: Gone Baby Gone
programme.desc: Two Boston area detectives investigate a little girl's kidnapping, which ultimately turns into a crisis

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
programme.desc: Holly is a deliciously eccentric New York City playgirl determined to marry a Brazilian millionaire.

programme.title: The Duchess
programme.desc: Chronicles the life of 18th century aristrocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, an ancestor of Princess Di.

programme.title: Final Run
programme.desc: A new, computer controlled train loses control due to an error in the system and speeds out of control while Urich attempts to stop it.

programme.title: Quicksilver
programme.desc: After losing his life savings playing the market, a trader quits his job and becomes a bicycle messenger.

programme.title: Gloria
programme.desc: A former showgirl and a 7-year-old orphan boy must run for their lives after the mob murders his family.

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: A public defender pokes into places she shouldn't while trying to exonerate an innocent man accused of murder. Edited for TV

programme.title: In A Lonely Place
programme.desc: Humphrey Bogart as a screenwriter falls in love with a neighbor who establishes an alibi when he is accused of murder.

programme.title: A Study In Terror
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson join the hunt for the notorious serial killer, Jack The Ripper.

programme.title: The Miracle Woman
programme.desc: A preacher's daughter becomes a pawn in a con man's elaborate ruse to pass her off as a faith healer.

programme.title: The Bedford Incident
programme.desc: The captain of a newly launched U.S. Destroyer is obsessed with hunting down a particular Soviet submarine regardless of the great risks involved.

programme.title: Neil Simons The Odd Couple II
programme.desc: The times may have changed, but thankfully not the traits that make ex-roomies Felix Ungar (Lemmon) and Oscar Madison (Matthau) the all-time perfect mismatch.

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees
programme.desc: The construction foreman of a fighting work battalion to be stationed near Japanese lines in the Pacific and a naval commander colleague compete in Washington for a journalist, while preparing to engage the enemy in a massive assault.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: Bend of the River
programme.desc: An outlaw-turned-wagon train scout clashes with his former comrade, who hijacks the settlers' supplies.

programme.title: Coal Miner's Daughter
programme.desc: The remarkable true story of country music star Loretta Lynn and her triumph in making a name for herself.

programme.title: The Great Waldo Pepper
programme.desc: A young stunt pilot seeks glory in a dramatic and death-defying airborne battle against an ace flyer from WWI.

programme.title: Year in Review
programme.desc: Let's take a look back at the biggest film and TV hits from 2001.

programme.title: RT Essentials
programme.desc: Watch out for that plot twist because we rundown the highest-rated M. Night Shyamalan Movies ever.

programme.title: After Show
programme.desc: Is Toy Story 4 Pixar's Best Yet? Plus, why The Lion King has such a low Tomatometer score.

programme.title: Go Back to China
programme.desc: When spoiled rich girl Sasha Li blows through half of her trust fund, she is cut off by her father and forced to go back to China and work for the family toy business.

programme.title: Some of Our Stallions
programme.desc: Two best friends struggle with mental illness while searching for the love of their lives

programme.title: Vanilla
programme.desc: A freewheeling comedienne determined to save her family business persuades an uptight app developer to go on a long first date - a road trip to New Orleans to sell a van with a complicated history.

programme.title: august at twenty-two
programme.desc: Cal, a floundering New York actress, accidentally falls in love with her best friend's girlfriend.

programme.title: Single & Sexy
programme.desc: Amy, a single lady in Miami Beach confuses love and money in a search for a perfect relationship.

programme.title: The Wedding in the Hamptons
programme.desc: A designer debuts at a Hamptons wedding and is mistaken for a socialite and falls for a groomsman.

programme.title: The Perfect Mate
programme.desc: After Hope's fiancé breaks up with her, platonic friend Jesse acts as a stand in to meet her parents.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: Love on Retreat
programme.desc: Sparks fly between Jenny and Nate at a corporate retreat, despite him being her boss's brother.

programme.title: Captive
programme.desc: In order to escape hectic city life, a young couple moves to Oregon where they buy and operate a small hotel. Their world is shattered when two criminals kidnap and terrorize them. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Ruby's Bucket Of Blood
programme.desc: Passion runs as ripe as the sweltering bayou summer when a forbidden relationship becomes an inevitable catalyst that changes the lives of everyone it touches in a Louisiana club.

programme.title: Evil
programme.desc: Swedish filmmaker Mikael Hafstrom directs the coming-of-age drama Ondskan (Evil), based on the autobiographical novel by Jan Guillou.

programme.title: Wedding Talk
programme.desc: In the series premiere, host Tara Lipinski watches incredible wedding films and breaks down all of the beautiful details with her co-hosts, wedding experts Jove Meyer and José Rolón.

programme.title: Wedding Talk
programme.desc: Host Tara Lipinski and wedding experts Jove Meyer and José Rolón showcase spectacular elopement weddings.

programme.title: The Christmas Wife
programme.desc: A widower (Jason Robards) not wanting to face his first Christmas alone responds to an ad for social introductions and enlists the services of forlorn escort, Iris (Julie Harris) to be his “Christmas Wife”. A holiday classic!

programme.title: Walking Street
programme.desc: Tae-seong goes to Thailand with his brother Tae-gi. They meet Jenna there and their lives turn upside down.

programme.title: Office (HELLBOUND's Jeong-Min Park)
programme.desc: Kim Byeong-Gook works as a section chief at a company. He is a family man and reliable with at his job, but, one day, he kills his entire family and disappears. Detective Jong-Hoon investigates the murder case and talks with his Kim Byeong-Gook's co-workers at his office. His colleagues though are not very forthcog with details. Besides, Lee Mi-Rye, who was very close with Kim Byeong-Gook, they seem to be hiding something.

programme.title: The Table (MINARI'S YE-RI HAN)
programme.desc: At the same table in the café, 4 pairs of people talked, their stories saturated with dream, hope, and fear.

programme.title: Life Risking Romance
programme.desc: What would you do if the love of your life were a serial killer? A crime novel writer Han Jane has become a nuisance to her neighbors by often mistaking her neighbors as suspects of crime. One day, she hears someone's scream from upstairs and decides that the person upstairs is the serial killer on loose. While Jane keeps pursuing the serial killer with help of Jason and her childhood friend, she witnesses a shocking scene that changes everything she had believed so far.

programme.title: Church Folks
programme.desc: Church Folks tells the story of Frank Hart. A local pastor struggling to keep his ministry alive. With dwindling attendance and the possibility of their lender foreclosing on their church building, Pastor Frank has to rally his team members to keep the doors of their church Open. They decide to revamp their workshop team, update some of Pastor Frank's old messages, and host a city-wide fellowship and fundraiser. Will it be enough to save their struggling ministry, or will they have to say goodbye to what they've spent the last 25 years building. Find out, Church Folks The Movie.

programme.title: Church Folks 2
programme.desc: Pastor Frank and his team are back with a new worship team, and a new plan to save their ministry. But time is not on their side. The clock is ticking, and every passing hour brings them closer to losing their ministry. With their lender itching to foreclose and a wealthy investor eying their building, the stakes have never been this high. Will they be able to bounce back?

programme.title: Consequences
programme.desc: Movanni Stewart is a successful businesswoman, with a traumatic past of abusive relationships, that has stalled her from finding romance. Kita, her best friend sets out on a mission to find her love again, and introduces her to Donovan Williams. When Movanni finally lets her guard down after giving in to his advances, he betrays her trust. She is stuck between a rock and a hard place because she loves him. Will love prevail or is it time for her to let go?

programme.title: Dark Seed
programme.desc: The ticking of her biological clock brings Emon, a hard-driving executive in line for a big promotion, to a decision not shared by her amiable husband Idreese in this intimate drama. A guilty secret buried in her past and an unspoken trauma lurking in his bring on a crisis, as the future of their seemingly perfect marriage hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Dangerous Men
programme.desc: Emmanuel is an assassin who goes against the order of his contractor X and refuses to carry out a hit placed on Senator Kingston. Emmanuel is forced to take turn a homeless man into the perfect killer. The deadly duo forms an alliance with Kingston and go after X. This leads to the ultimate showdown between the assassin and the head of the organization. Get ready for non-stop action, masterful fight sequences.

programme.title: The Twilight of the Golds
programme.desc: When Suzanne has an analysis done on her unborn child, she discovers the child will most likely be born gay.

programme.title: In Hell
programme.desc: Kyle LeBlanc (Jean-Claude Van Damme) is an honorable citizen who winds up incarcerated in Russia after he takes revenge on the man who murdered his wife, resulting in the killer's death. Unfortunately for Kyle, he is assigned to a prison that is renowned for its violence. Controlled by a corrupt and sadistic warden, the facility regularly holds brutal fights between inmates. In order to survive in the prison, Kyle must participate in the battles, even as he attempts to retain his humanity.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: In this crime thriller, mercenary John Seeger (Steven Seagal, "Exit Wounds") attempts to break into Eastern Europe's most impenetrable prison and free the son of a notorious drug lord.

programme.title: The Matthew Shepard Story
programme.desc: In this dramatization of an actual event, young Matthew Shepard (Shane Meier) is mercilessly slain by a pair of men who targeted their victim because of his homosexuality. Capital punishment looming, the killers' fate lies in the hands of Matthew's parents, Judy (Stockard Channing) and Dennis (Sam Waterston). As the grieving couple attempts to make the choice that will best serve Matthew's memory, they recount his rocky adolescence, lifelong struggle for acceptance and personal views on life.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A deadly virus threatens to wipe out an entire Rocky Mountain town, forcing the town doctor (Steven Seagal) to escape the soldiers who enforce the town's quarantine and devise a cure.

programme.title: Streets of Blood
programme.desc: While investigating the "accidental" death of his partner, a New Orleans police officer plunges into the city's criminal underworld. Starring Val Kilmer ("The Doors") and 50 Cent.

programme.title: King of the Avenue
programme.desc: An ambitious drug dealer sells his soul to the devil to become the city's biggest drug boss, knowing that when Satan comes to collect, he'll have to outwit a most evil force.

programme.title: Metro
programme.desc: Moscow's underground train system sees terror after a collapsed tunnel causes massive flooding. Subtitled.

programme.title: The Moody Blues
programme.desc: Celebrating the 50th anniversary of their landmark album, Days of Future Passed, The Moody Blues took to the road to perform the entire LP live. This film, capturing an electric evening at The Sony Centre, Toronto, where the band was joined on stage by a full orchestra for the first time ever, is the definitive performance of this seminal album. This spectacle of a show features stunning visuals and a unique narration performed by Jeremy Irons, transporting the audience and viewer to the psychedelic dream world of their classic record. Including the iconic hits Nights In White Satin and Tuesday Afternoon, this film truly pays homage to five decades of musical mastery. In this impressive yet intimate auditorium, The Moody Blues have never sounded better.

programme.title: Especiales del Once

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Remigio le propone a Adolfo matar a Manuel a cambio de su libertad. Matilde va a hablar con Remigio para que le explique el motivo del arresto de su administrador. Prudencia le dice que es una insensata por ponerse en evidencia.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Las sospechas de Santa
programme.desc: Santa sospecha que fue José Antonio el que ayudó a Octavio a llevarse a Lupita Miguel se sorprende al ver que Simona está perdiendo la cordura Maricruz les dice a todos que va a pelear por su hija y buscará a Octavio para arreglar la situación.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Pasión desenfrenada
programme.desc: Hilario le dice a Sanjuana que su relación no funcionará y se despide de ella para siempre. Francisco busca a Isadora para pasar una noche apasionada con ella.

programme.title: Teresa: Traición

programme.title: Rubí: Un nuevo empleo
programme.desc: Rubí empieza a coquetearle a Héctor y consigue trabajar con él en el despacho de su padrino, pero él se siente preocupado, porque Rubí es compañera de Luis, un hijo que tiene con otra persona.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: El regreso

programme.desc: Karla y los demás empleados descubren a Damián en el cuarto de Braulio. Alejandro desconoce a Luciana como su madre. Constancio se rehúsa a decir la verdad a pesar de ver el cuadro de Rosario y Mili.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Sacrificio
programme.desc: David se entera de que Perla fue asesinada y no puede evitar pensar en que Juan tuvo algo que ver. Por otro lado, Miguel le pide una oportunidad a Luciana para demostrarle todo su amor.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 71
programme.desc: Soraya asegura que María es una mala mujer. Soraya teme que el juez descubra que es una mala mujer. Nandito y Alicia declaran en contra de Soraya pero ella lo desmiente todo.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 72
programme.desc: Soraya le asegura al juez que es inocente. Soraya queda en libertad, Alicia se pone muy nerviosa ya que tendrá que regresar a vivir con ella. Alicia se niega a regresar a vivir con Soraya. Soraya idea un plan para deshacerse de María.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le reclama a Diego por mandarlo matar. Hipólita se entera cuál es el verdadero nombre de Luis. Por su parte, Luis le dice a Esperanza que quiere anular su matrimonio.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Diego le pide a Juana que le arregle una cita con Hipólita antes de que Luis le gane. Por su parte, Perla va a buscar a Cristóbal para que le ayude a leer una carta pero encuentra a Luis primero y él se da cuenta que es una carta de su familia.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le advierte a Diego que se mantenga alejado de Hipólita. Luis le dice a Ada que sabe muchas cosas de Hipólita y que sabe de su hijo para ver si ella lo confirma.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le pregunta a Hipólita si tuvo algún hijo fuera de matrimonio y ella sospecha que es el padre de su hijo. Además, ella decide aceptar la ayuda de Diego.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Valentina idea un plan para saber el pasado de José Miguel. Sandra sufre al saber que su madre jamás aceptará su relación con Felipe. Isabel decide alejarse de Federico para evitar malentendidos.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le advierte a Diego que se mantenga alejado de Hipólita. Luis le dice a Ada que sabe muchas cosas de Hipólita y que sabe de su hijo para ver si ella lo confirma.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Situaciones ocultas
programme.desc: Leonardo llega al funeral de Marcelo y acusa a Eugenio de ser el autor de todos los crímenes. Elisa teme que Leonardo descubra cosas sobre ella y la denuncie.

programme.title: La Gata: Amor prohibido
programme.desc: Pablo le declara todo su amor a Esmeralda y le dice que no podría estar separado de ella. Por otra parte, Lorenza busca a Pablo y le dice que no tendrá una relación con Esmeralda.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Amor resignado
programme.desc: Rogelio le pide a Ana Paula que se vaya de la hacienda. Macaria le pide a Ulises que le confiese si él siente un interés por Rocío. Ana Paula intenta enamorar de nuevo a Rogelio. Cynthia se molesta con Gustavo, ya que sigue interesado en Ana Paula.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Ayuda por conveniencia
programme.desc: Raquel le pide a Bruno que no ayude a María José a recuperarse. Bruno le dice a Alex que ayudará a María José si le cede la presidencia de la empresa y se divorcia de ella. María José se entera de que Bruno fue quien le donó sangre.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Confesión de un crimen
programme.desc: Ingrid confiesa su crimen y jura que no lo hizo a propósito. Carmina le dice a Begoña que Ingrid no se puede casar con Edmundo porque está casada con Gabino.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Relación terminada
programme.desc: Ivana le exige a Toledo que se aleje de ella. Toledo idea un plan para reconquistar a Ivana. Leonor cree que Ivana tiene una relación secreta con Toledo. Valentina decide terminar su relación con José Miguel para evitar que Ivana los descubra.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Ayuda externa
programme.desc: Paulina descubre que Paola se encuentra en Acapulco y ha estado disponiendo de su dinero. Estela continúa vigilando a Willy a petición de Estefanía. Paulina le propone a Willy darle un auto nuevo si la ayuda a salvar a Estefanía.

programme.title: El manantial: Enemistad en puerta
programme.desc: Gilberto y Alejandro visitan a Alfonsina y ella aprovecha la ocasión en su beneficio. Héctor termina con Malena ya que tiene sentimientos por otra.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Los empleados del hotel confunden a la mamá del dueño con otra mujer. Don Chava se enamora de la mamá del patrón y trata de conquistarla, pero ella lo desprecia.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Vítor le organiza una fiesta de quince años a su mamá porque nunca pudo celebrarlos y le pide a todos sus compañeros que lo apoyen siendo padrinos de su madre.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano están a punto de ser expulsados del condominio, pero se hacen amigos de sus vecinos en una fiesta y les permiten quedarse.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor deciden cambiar su apariencia drásticamente para conquistar mujeres, pero optar por volver a su vida normal después de ver que el plan no funciona.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María de Todos los Ángeles es una mujer que siente que se está haciendo vieja sin haber encontrado el amor de su vida. Ella tiene un sueño en el que los ángeles anuncian que pronto el amor de su vida va a llegar.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María decide provocar un encuentro con Albertano para verlo directamente a los ojos y descubrir si es el amor de su vida. La vida de Albertano corre peligro y María se arriesga para salvarlo.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido acaba de recordar que es su aniversario de bodas con Renata, por lo que le organizará una cena romántica. Martina invita al cine a la familia a ver el estreno de una película.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Aldolfo pierde el bono huachicolero por bañarse, y con la ayuda de Jacinta se convierte en hierbero. Carlos recibe regalos de un admirador secreto.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico descubre que no tiene nada de dinero, el banco los va a embargar y Federica habla con ellos y les dice que Ludovico se murió para que cancelen su deuda, pero asistirán al velorio porque es una muerte muy sospechosa.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico no sabe qué regalarle a Federica para su aniversario, se emborracha con Flavio y van a tatuarse los nombres de sus esposas, pero los tatuadores se equivocan y ponen los nombres al revés.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Pedro, el mejor amigo de Paco, está a punto de perder su matrimonio por engañar a su esposa, pero Paco le podría salvar la vida.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Toña se fue de la casa y Brayan Danielle les recomienda a Paco y Fran a su tía, Doña Lucha, para que les ayude con la limpieza.

programme.title: Vecinos: El nuevo vecino
programme.desc: Arturo López pide un préstamo y por una confusión puede retirar cien mil pesos Pao y Ro regresan por su hijo, pero Luis se niega, por lo que querrán que el niño escoja con quien irse.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Font acepta que Santos realice un documental del colegio Sol logra que despidan a Mayra por recriminarle su acoso al profesor Gonzalo los alumnos se quejan de las injusticias del director Lola obliga a Sol a pedirle perdón a Lupita.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: El director les anuncia a los estudiantes que el profesor Gonzalo ha sido despedido del colegio por traspasar los vínculos entre docente y estudiante.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel siente celos al ver a Mía con Gastón. El director Font ve a Sol en bikini e intenta besarla. Alma le ofrece a Mayra ser su asistente. Mía planea ayudar a Alma en su show junto a RBD.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: El padre de Diego habla con él pidiéndole que no ayude a Alma, ya que ahora su carrera política está en lo alto, mientras que el director es despedido.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Leonardo quiere ser novio de Lupita, pero Lola piensa que es con ella con quien quiere andar el señor Mendiola les informa a los alumnos que el nuevo director del colegio es Pascual Miguel se enoja con Mia por salir con Gastón y mentirle.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: León ensucia el agua del colegio para poder comprarlo. Roger se hace el enfermo para que Roberta lo cuide.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Quieren cerrar el colegio porque los inspectores determinan que las instalaciones no están en condiciones óptimas. Lola se lanza a los brazos de Leo y lo besa delante de Lupita. RBD actúa como grupo coreográfico de Alma ocultos tras una máscara.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Pascual se siente un hombre afortunado Lola insulta a Leonardo al saber que no está interesado en ella Mia acepta dejar de ser amiga de Gastón León le dice a Diego que es socio del Elite Gastón, al ver a Mia, finge que Miguel lo golpea.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: Federico forcejea con Cristina y cae desde el primer piso de la casa. Cristina llama al doctor Robles para que ayude a Federico después de la caída. Juliana visita a Damiana en el hotel para proponerle suplantarla por un tiempo.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: Federico no siente las piernas cuando despierta en el hospital. Damiana y Juliana son las únicas que acuden al funeral de Porfirio. Raquela se manifiesta en el cuarto de Federico, diciéndole que no puede escapar de la maldición.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: Cristina se desvanece en el consultorio del doctor Robles. José María sufre un accidente mientras Raquela se encuentra cerca. Deborah se entera de que Cristina tuvo una hija.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.sub-title: Atado a una silla de ruedas
programme.desc: El doctor Robles le informa a Cristina que está embarazada. El doctor Robles confirma que José María es hijo de Federico se entera, por una prueba de ADN. Damiana llega al hospital a visitar a Federico cuando Déborah está con él.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Eduardo lleva a cabo sus planes para saber si Bárbara es una estafadora. René descubre que Eduardo tiene una doble identidad. Aurora le confiesa a Santiago el inmenso amor que siente por él.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: René idea un plan para demostrarle a los Elizalde que Eduardo no es el buen hombre que dice ser. Camilo sospecha que Fernanda está enamorada de Eduardo. Priscila enfurece al saber que Aníbal le ha robado mucho dinero.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Eduardo idea un plan para saber por qué Ciro lo nombro su principal heredero. Jairo enfurece al saber que Lucio mató a René. Gardenia descubre que Eduardo tiene una doble identidad.

programme.title: El día de las madres
programme.desc: Los habitantes de una vecindad su reúnen para celebrar el "Día de las madres" y reconocen el sacrificio de ellas.

programme.title: La Hija de Nadie
programme.desc: Desde pequeñas, Yolanda y su hermana gemela Irene sufren por el abandono de su padre. Al crecer, Yolanda se convierte en cantante y encuentra el amor, mientras que Irene sufre tragedias y decepciones. El destino las enfrenta con su padre de nuevo.

programme.title: Papá en onda
programme.desc: Un hombre maduro, que envidia la vida alegre de sus hijos, a escondidas los imita y sale a divertirse con jóvenes de la edad de ellos.

programme.title: Andante
programme.desc: Una joven se enamora de un pianista de música clásica y tiene problemas con sus amigos de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: Un gallo en corral ajeno
programme.desc: Laura es una escultora exigente y aristócrata que, en vista de la poca suerte que ha tenido con sus pretendientes, prefiere poder esculpir a un hombre a su gusto, sin importar su clase social.

programme.title: Siempre tuya
programme.desc: Ramón y Soledad, campesinos zacatecanos, llegan a Ciudad de México dejando atrás la miseria. Más adelante, Ramón triunfa como cantante y es pretendido por una actriz, lo que hace que él pierda el piso por el éxito.

programme.title: Guitarras lloren guitarras
programme.desc: Juan de Altamira, Tamaulipas, llega a la estación de tren en la capital y es agredido por Gus. Mientras se encuentra con sólo diez dólares en su billetera, cree que Juan le presta dinero y le ofrece alojamiento en su habitación para pagar el alquiler.

programme.title: El pecado de ser mujer
programme.desc: Un artista vanidoso y que despilfarra el dinero que gana gracias a su carrera, ofrece un concierto en donde conoce a María Luisa, a quien embaraza y luego huye de su responsabilidad. Años más tarde, la vida de Javier da un giro, quedando en la pobreza.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Cada cual Carga con la Cruz de su Parroquia
programme.desc: Un hombre que engaña a su esposa, sale con su amigo sin saber que sus intenciones son malas y que está enamorado de su esposa.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una chica tiene una pésima relación con su madre. La madre se pone mal y corre a su hija de la casa. La chica sale a la calle y se encuentra con su prima quien fomenta el reencuentro.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Desde que era niño, Ricardo ha sufrido abuso sexual por parte de su padrino, quien también es su entrenador de fútbol. Al sentirse mal, le hacen unos análisis y le diagnostican cáncer testicular, por lo que busca justicia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una joven comienza a beber porque en su casa tiene muchos problemas, un día la chica se droga y la llevan al hospital, pero ella sigue bebiendo. Sus padres la ayudan y deciden tomar terapia familiar.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una joven vive con su abuela, pero la señora la trata muy mal porque ella es hija de la sirvienta. El hijo de la señora pierde su casa en un juego y le pide a su madre que deje que él y su familia vivan con ella.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una joven trabaja en una clínica donde hacen cirugías plásticas y se enamora del médico, pero cree que él no se fijará en ella por no ser delgada y comienza a dejar de comer. Luego reacciona al ver que su amiga fallece por padecer anorexia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una señora es asaltada por tres hombres que la golpean en la espalda dejándola paralítica, su hijo trata de defenderla, pero también es golpeado por ellos. El joven comienza a tomar clases de kung fu para vengarse de los asaltantes.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Cada cual Carga con la Cruz de su Parroquia
programme.desc: Un hombre que engaña a su esposa, sale con su amigo sin saber que sus intenciones son malas y que está enamorado de su esposa.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: En ausencia de Maria José, Lucero llega como invitada especial tomando el papel de juez. Ernesto D'alessio se mide en el karaoke.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Un programa lleno de sorpresas, música y concursos, en los cuales participan los jueces junto con los pequeños gigantes. Alejandra Guzmán y Moderatto interpretan sus éxitos acompañados por los concursantes.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La noche se engalana con la presencia de invitados como Luis Fonsi, Benny Ibarra y Bianca Marroquín que sorprende al público interpretando una melodía. Los capitanes de cada equipo se enfrentan en una ronda de preguntas para obtener un punto extra.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Carlos Ponce, Anahí y Christian Castro
programme.desc: Pequeños Gigantes llega a su fin con la participación de estrellas como Carlos Ponce, Anahí, Christian Castro y más. Se dará a conocer al equipo vencedor.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una familia destruida tras un ataque inesperado habla sobre todo lo que sufrieron al perder a sus seres queridos en manos de organizaciones delictivas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: El hijo del Chapo: Captura y liberación de un intocable
programme.desc: El ejército mexicano despliega un operativo en Culiacán, Sinaloa, para detener a un familiar de Joaquín Guzmán Loera, 'El Chapo'. El objetivo es capturado y, durante un día, Culiacán queda atrapada en un enfrentamiento entre el ejército y los narcos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Fentanilo la nueva apuesta del narco
programme.desc: México es país productor y de tránsito de Fentanilo, un opioide sintético cada vez más consumido en Estados Unidos. Esta droga causa muchas muertes entre jóvenes. Un kilo de fentanilo genera las mismas ganancias que una tonelada de cocaína.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La muerte de la soldado Vanessa Guillén ha provocado un movimiento nacional para hablar sobre un tema incómodo, la violencia sexual contra las mujeres en las fuerzas armadas dutrante años, los abusos contra ellas han sido una epidemia sin control.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una banda de asaltantes con armas de juguete se llevó casi veinte millones de dólares de las cajillas de seguridad de un banco, lo sorprendente es que no hubo heridos ni disparos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Chefs A'Field: Culinary Adventures

Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock and his pack of angry cougar cheerleaders. And finally, Lyndah reveals her plot for the whole team to work together and repossess an entire truckload of souped-up go karts.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park where they find a debtor who's as angry as he is drunk. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah travel under the cover of night to repossess a vehicle from a young woman and her irate yoga instructor.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford from a delusional nerd who may as well actually be from space. And finally, Lou and Lyndah have trouble getting to their car because there's a chainsaw-wielding gardener in the way.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.title: A Zamboni?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing. And finally, Lou & Matt hit the ice and a bunch of irate hockey players in an effort to repossess a Zamboni

programme.title: Instruction and Destruction
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Angry Swarms
programme.desc: Matt, Lou, and Lyndah try to repo a car from a man who is not afraid to throw some punches. Then, Matt and Lou face a dilemma when they realize their target vehicle is filled with angry bees. And, Sonia and Froy hit the airwaves to reclaim a truck that's being used in a radio broadcast stunt.

programme.title: We Have to Dispose of It
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Matt hunt down a truck that's being used by a pool cleaner to engage in some illicit activities with a collection of wealthy wives. Then, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a business dispute when they try to sneak off with a catering van filled with food. And finally, Froy, Lyndah, and Matt wind up in the middle of a gang dispute when they try to repo a tricked out lowrider on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids

programme.title: Repo Basher vs. Matt

Plus, Drew kicks off Cookbook Countdown, in advance of the release of her first cookbook “Rebel Homemaker,” and is joined by TikTok sensation Larray to taste some loaded mac and cheeses. Then, photographer Gillian Laub, who has photographed some of the most influential people in the world, shares why she chose to turn the lens on herself and her family in her new book, ‘Family Matters.”

Then, Drew continues the countdown to the newest “Scream” film with star Melissa Barrera. Plus, meet Drew-Gooder Carlos Aponte, a history teacher from Philadelphia who extends learning outside of the classroom by getting his students involved in their community.

Plus, Pop Quiz Week continues, where every day one in-studio audience member will play for a chance win time in a money booth filled with $10,000.

Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are taking their desk on the road and serving you the news sunny-side up from Philadelphia. Drew is celebrating hometown pride all week long with viewers sharing tours of what makes their town so special and unique including today's hometown spirit tour of Denver.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers must work in teams of two to create looks for “mature” women, who also serve as their clients and models for this challenge. Joan and Melissa Rivers guest judge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Before the challenge begins, the designers are asked to re-pick their teams. Then, in teams of two, the designers are tasked with making a prom dress out of duct tape. In addition to the Runway, they are also judged on their work by a group of high school students, whose votes factor into their final score. Two designers are eliminated.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Regrouping once again, the judges decide which designers they would like to see work together, and the teams are separated into two teams of four. The designers must make cohesive looks for the male dance troupe Thunder From Down Under. Not only must they execute menswear, but their designs must be able to “tear away” onstage as part of their performance.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In new teams of twos and threes, the designers make a ready-to-wear look for Lord and Taylor, inspired by their famous rose design. The winning design is manufactured and sold at Lord and Taylor for Spring 2013.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In pairs again, the designers use HP technology and inspiration drawn from the Guggenheim Museum to create two looks: one avant-garde and a second ready-to-wear piece. They are also able to design their fabric for this challenge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: After working in teams all season, the designers are relieved when they receive the news that they will now be working on their own. However, some of the eliminated designers return to act as assistants and help the competitors complete their look. For this challenge, the designers must make a Spring 2013 editorial look to be worn by actress Jordana Brewster and featured in Marie Claire.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The remaining designers are paired with new assistants and each sent to a European fashion capital: Paris, Barcelona, London, and Berlin. One unlucky designer stays in NYC. The designers must draw inspiration from their city, as well as purchase their materials there. Upon returning to NYC, they must create a look for the judges that will prove they have what it takes to design a collection for Fashion Week.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Weak and weary from their journey, the few designers left say goodbye to NYC and return to their respective hometowns to begin working on their final collections. Tim Gunn travels to visit the designers and assess their progress. In the end, all four remaining designers must present their three best pieces to the judging panel, as the judges are left to decide who will move on to show at Mercedes Benz Fashion Week.
